channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Ken Carson Sets July Release Date for New Album ‘xperiment’
item.description: 🚀 Ken Carson is dropping some fire this July with his new album 'xperiment'! 🔥 Who's ready to vibe? 🎶 #NewMusicAlert #KenCarson

item.title: Tay Keith’s Family Pays Tribute to Late Producer: A ‘Cultural Force’ & ‘Source of Love, Strength, Laughter, Guidance’
item.description: Celebrating Tay Keith's legacy 🙌🎶🌟 His family recalls his impact as a 'cultural force' and a source of love, strength, and laughter. #RIP 💔

item.title: Steven Spielberg weighs in on viral question of whether E.T. was slimy or dry
item.description: 👽 Spielberg spills the beans on E.T.'s slimy or dry debate! Get the scoop on everyone's favorite extraterrestrial! 👾 #ET #StevenSpielberg

item.title: Geese’s Live Show: Not A Psyop
item.description: 🎶 Let's flock together for Geese's mind-blowing live show! No mind games, just pure musical magic 🦢✨ #GeeseLiveShow

item.title: La La Land Celebrates 10th Anniversary with Global Concert Series
item.description: 🎉 Join the La La Land celebration! Get ready to dance around the world with their global concert series 🌍🎶 #LaLaLand10
